ext.description: Paste-only secure editor for .env files with at-rest encryption. Activate via 'Reopen Editor With…' when a sibling .env.keys exists. Values are encrypted on write, decrypted on view; keys remain visible.
view.container.title: Vibecode .env Encryption
config.title: Vibecode .env Encryption
config.strategy.description: Encryption backend used when writing values. `none` stores values as plaintext (same as the non-encrypted variant). `dotenvx` encrypts values using DOTENV_PUBLIC_KEY and requires a sibling .env.keys file — bootstrap once with `npx dotenvx encrypt`.
config.strategy.none.description: No encryption — values stored as plaintext.
config.strategy.dotenvx.description: secp256k1 ECIES encryption, dotenvx-compatible. Requires DOTENV_PUBLIC_KEY in .env and a sibling .env.keys file.
config.strategy.infisical.description: (stub — not implemented yet) Remote secret store; values would be replaced with reference tokens. Falls back to `none` until SDK wiring lands.
command.enableEncryption.title: Vibecode - Enable Encryption (generate .env.keys)
command.refreshHub.title: Vibecode - Refresh Encryption Hub
command.selectStrategy.title: Vibecode - Select Encryption Strategy
command.openEncrypted.title: Vibecode - Open in Encrypted Editor
